title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: Desert politics, ecology, prophecy, and power collide on a planet that controls the galaxy's most valuable resource.

title: The Left Hand of Darkness
author: Ursula K. Le Guin
description: An envoy studies a world whose culture challenges fixed ideas of gender, loyalty, and belonging.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
description: A lone astronaut wakes with no memory and must solve an extinction-level problem with science and improvisation.

title: The Martian

title: Neuromancer

title: Foundation

title: Hyperion

description: Pilgrims share stories while traveling toward a terrifying being on a distant world.

title: The Long Way to a Small Angry Planet

title: The Hobbit

description: A comfort-loving hobbit joins dwarves and a wizard on a quest for treasure and courage.

title: The Fellowship of the Ring
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A fellowship carries a dangerous ring across a world shadowed by ancient evil.

title: A Game of Thrones

title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo

title: Big Little Lies

title: The Silent Patient

title: Rebecca

title: The Thursday Murder Club
author: Richard Osman

title: Educated

title: The Kiss Quotient

title: Good Omens

title: American Gods

description: Old gods and new powers clash across an uncanny American landscape.

title: Neverwhere

title: Kindred

title: Parable of the Sower

title: Klara and the Sun

title: The Remains of the Day

title: The Alchemist

title: The Midnight Library

title: Anxious People

title: A Man Called Ove

title: The Shadow of the Wind

title: The Priory of the Orange Tree

title: Babel

title: Yellowface

title: Sea of Tranquility
